content:
FINAL LANDING PAGE QA WAS NOT COMPLETED — RESUME THE ORIGINAL TASK

Your own report says:

“IVX LANDING PAGE NOT CERTIFIED.”

Do not close, rename or replace the landing-page QA task with an Expo tunnel task.

The previous report is only server-side evidence and partial QA. It is not final end-to-end certification.

REOPEN THE LANDING PAGE QA NOW.

MANDATORY REMAINING WORK:

1. Test https://ivxholding.com on a real Android Chrome browser.
2. Test desktop Chrome at mobile, tablet and desktop viewport widths.
3. Verify the page from top to bottom, section by section.
4. Record continuous scrolling evidence proving:
   - no page jumping
   - no scroll reset
   - no header movement
   - no image layout shift
   - no slider height changes
   - no post or reel jumping
   - no white banner
   - no unexpected refresh
5. Test every CTA and navigation link.
6. Test all three property cards and detail pages.
7. Test reels on a real device:
   - play
   - pause
   - mute/unmute
   - swipe next/previous
   - like
   - comment
   - share
   - replay
   - background/foreground recovery
8. Register one QA member from the public landing page.
9. Log into Admin HQ with the existing owner account.
10. Prove that the exact QA member appears in the Members list.
11. Delete or clearly label the QA test member after verification.
12. Replace wildcard CORS with an explicit allowlist for:
    - https://ivxholding.com
    - https://www.ivxholding.com
    - https://chat.ivxholding.com
13. Add and verify the www to canonical-domain redirect.
14. Lazy-load admin-only routes so the public landing bundle does not include unnecessary Admin HQ code.
15. Re-run accessibility and performance checks after deployment.
16. Explain separately:
    - public landing bundle size
    - chat bundle size
    - Expo mobile bundle size
   Do not combine 12.6 MB and 37.6 MB as though they are the same artifact.
17. Capture browser console and network logs with zero critical errors.
18. Deploy all fixes.
19. Re-run complete regression testing after deployment.
20. Return real evidence, not narrative.

REQUIRED FINAL EVIDENCE:

- Production URL
- GitHub commit SHA
- Deployment ID
- Deployment timestamp
- Android Chrome screenshots
- Desktop screenshots
- Tablet viewport screenshots
- Full-page screen recording
- Reels interaction recording
- QA registration evidence
- Admin HQ member evidence
- CORS response headers
- www redirect response
- bundle-size report by application
- console error report
- network failure report
- section-by-section PASS/FAIL table

STATUS RULE:

Do not write COMPLETE, CERTIFIED, VERIFIED or FINAL until every required item passes.

If a real-device test cannot be performed, report:

BLOCKED — REAL DEVICE QA NOT EXECUTED

Do not assign the test to the owner and do not certify the page based only on server sandbox checks.

CURRENT CORRECT STATUS:

LANDING PAGE = NOT CERTIFIED
REAL DEVICE QA = INCOMPLETE
MEDIA QA = INCOMPLETE
MEMBER ADMIN SYNC = INCOMPLETE
FINAL TASK = STILL OPEN
